title: Tedryn-Sha
content:
{{Top|fa|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tedryn]] or his [[Tedryn Holocron|holocron]]}} {{Conflicting|[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]]|[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Sha.jpg]] |name=Tedryn-Sha |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]In [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]], Tedryn-Sha [[Death/Legends|dies]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attack]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|III|227|Tedryn-Sha}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]][[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Dark Empire]] **[[Dark Side Elite]] **[[Dark Side Squadron]][[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] |masters=[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I am Tedryn-Sha, Palpatine's second in command!|Tedryn-Sha|}} '''Tedryn-Sha''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] loyal to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who reigned over his [[Dark Empire]] after being [[Transfer essence|reborn]] in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], after Palpatine's elite cadre of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], the [[Dark Side Elite]], suffered [[Skirmish on Ossus|losses]] due to the efforts of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[New Jedi Order|his Jedi]], Sha was chosen to reinforce the group. The [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] empowered Sha and a fellow [[darksider]] named [[Xecr Nist]] with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]; Nist became the Emperor's newest [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]], while Sha was appointed as Palpatine's second-in-command. Later, Sha participated in an [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attack]] on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Aldera|hideout]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. Tasked with incapacitating Skywalker by [[Poison/Legends|poisoning]] him with miniature [[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid|scarab droids]] so he could be taken captive, Sha and the Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Krdys Mordi]] infiltrated Skywalker's personal quarters while he was [[Sleep/Legends|asleep]] and released the [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. However, the Jedi's screams alerted his sister, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]] [[Jem Ysanna]], who rushed to his aid. In the ensuing fight, both Sha and Mordi were [[Death/Legends|slain]], although Sha managed to mortally wound Ysanna beforehand. ==Biography== ===The initiation=== {{Quote|You…''Tedryn-Sha and Xecr Nist—!'' I have ''watched'' you…you have advanced in submission to my ''will!'' I will make you ''Dark Jedi''…extensions of my own power! ''Kneel before me! […]'' Tedryn-Sha—''you'' will be second in command.|Palpatine|}} Tedryn-Sha, a [[Human/Legends|Human]], was a [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] serving as a personal [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]] to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who was [[Transfer essence|reborn]] in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body yet again[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] after [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|being]] [[Death/Legends|killed]][[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his sister, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. After the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] return later the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Tedryn-Sha, along with a [[darksider]] named [[Xecr Nist]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] [[Umak Leth]], joined Palpatine on an inspection tour of his newest [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[Galaxy Gun]], which was being constructed in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Palpatine's [[Dark Empire]]. [[File:Elite5.jpg|thumb|left|275px|Tedryn-Sha undergoes appointment to the Dark Side Elite alongside Xecr Nist.]] As they were performing the inspection aboard a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], Palpatine was notified that [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]] and [[Vill Goir]], two members of the [[Dark Side Elite]], Palpatine's elite cadre of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], [[Skirmish on Ossus|had been killed]] by Skywalker on the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. To replace the fallen Dark [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], Palpatine chose Tedryn-Sha and Xecr Nist, empowering them with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. The ritual was so powerful that it caused a [[Disturbance in the Force/Legends|disturbance in the Force]], which was even [[Force sense/Legends|felt]] by Skywalker back on Ossus. Palpatine then named Nist the new Executor, thus placing him in charge of the entire [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], while Tedryn-Sha became Palpatine's second-in-command. While those events transpired, a shipment of [[X-1 Viper]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], procured from [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Hinch Beltane]] of the planet [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], arrived on Byss aboard the [[Modular taskforce cruiser|star hauler]] [[Reliance (star hauler)|''Reliance'']]. However, Beltane had secretly betrayed the Empire and had allowed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] a group of [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] within the droids. After the droids were delivered to the [[Emperor's Citadel]], the infiltrators powered them up. Sha then bore witness as the New Republic forces [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel|launched their attack]] on the Emperor's [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]]. In response, the Emperor gave the order to release fearsome [[chrysalide]] [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]], which repelled the Viper droids' attack. Nonetheless, the New Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] escaped from Byss with the help of local smugglers.[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] Having complete confidence in the power of the Galaxy Gun, Palpatine gave his forces the order to let the fleeing smuggler [[Starship/Legends|ships]] go, a command that took his newly appointed Dark Jedi by surprise. Knowing that the enemy would return to [[Pinnacle Base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Da Soocha V]], Palpatine issued an order to fire the Galaxy Gun, [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|obliterating]] the moon. ===Arrival on Vjun=== {{Quote|Nist…there's a statue of ''Lord Vader!'' This used to be ''his'' castle.|Tedryn-Sha, upon arrival at Bast Castle|}} With the New Republic in disarray after the destruction of its base, Palpatine directed his efforts toward locating Skywalker and his handful [[New Jedi Order|Jedi recruits]]. The Emperor believed that the Jedi would take refuge on the same planet that served as the secret hiding place of Leia Organa [[Solo family/Legends|Solo]] and her children—the [[Solo twins|twins]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]]. Sha's Master hoped to capture the children so he could turn them over to the dark side, but he needed to learn the location of the planet first. The opportunity presented itself when a New Republic [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Ntthan]], was captured by the Empire in an [[Star map/Legends|uncharted]] region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] while making a supply run to the New Republic hideout. The pilot was promptly delivered to [[Bast Castle]] on the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]], the headquarters of the Dark Side Elite, where Dark Jedi [[Kvag Gthull]] started interrogating him in order to learn Organa Solo's location. [[File:Statue_of_Vader.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tedryn-Sha accompanies his Master to Bast Castle.]] Sha and Nist accompanied Palpatine to Bast Castle aboard the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] ''[[Tridius]]'' to oversee the results of the interrogation. When they arrived, Gthull informed Palpatine and the Dark Jedi that after a twelve-[[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]-long [[Torture/Legends|torture]] session, Ntthan had revealed the coordinates and the name of the planet—[[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. Palpatine ordered Nist to assemble all Dark Jedi and embark on a mission there. The darksiders were to infiltrate the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[New Aldera]] and capture Skywalker and the Solo children, after which the Empire would launch a full-scale assault on the settlement using [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]]. Boarding [[I-7 Howlrunner]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], Sha and the rest of the Dark Side Elite embarked on a journey toward their goal as part of [[Dark Side Squadron]]. Upon exiting [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] near New Alderaan, Sha consulted the ship's [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] but was unable to detect the presence of Skywalker and his allies. Nist assured him that they were indeed on the planet and advised Sha to rely on the dark side to guide him to his target. ===The incursion on New Alderaan=== {{Quote|How can we take him alive? Even in his sleep, he may sense our approach!''"
"''We will not make the first attack. I intend to use…these.''"
"''Scarab droids!''"
"''Yes. Lovely creations, aren't they? A dozen of them will burrow into Skywalker's flesh, filling him with poison and pain. Then you and one other Dark Jedi will capture Skywalker. I will take the others to steal the children.''"
"''But…what if Skywalker detects the scarab droids?''"
"''He will not. The Emperor himself has promised…a distraction.|Tedryn-Sha and Xecr Nist, upon arrival on New Alderaan|}} As the darksiders' ships approached the New Republic settlement, they passed above Skywalker himself, who was standing outdoors alongside one of his [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainees]], [[Jem Ysanna]]. Although the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] did not notice the ships, he almost sensed the presence of the Dark Jedi through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], a result of Sha failing to [[Force stealth|mask his Force presence]] well enough. After Dark Side Squadron landed their ships, Nist reprimanded Sha for his mistake. The Executor then dispatched Sha and Dark Jedi [[Krdys Mordi]] to Skywalker's quarters, providing the pair with a number of tiny [[Scarab Mark VI assassin droid|scarab droids]], which carried a powerful [[Poison/Legends|poison]] capable of incapacitating the Jedi. Sha and Mordi were to release the droids upon Skywalker, who was battling Palpatine in his [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]], as the Emperor had entered the Jedi's [[Dream/Legends|dreams]] and was haunting him there. Nist himself took the rest of the Dark Jedi and went after the Solo twins. Making sure to hide their Force presence from Skywalker this time, Sha and Mordi successfully reached the building that housed Skywalker's quarters. Releasing the scarab droids upon him through a [[Window/Legends|window]] to his room, the two watched as the droids began their work on immobilizing the Jedi. However, just as Sha and Mordi entered the room and moved in to claim their captive, Skywalker cried out in his sleep, resisting the Emperor's influence. That scream alerted Organa Solo and Ysanna, who arrived at the scene ready to defend the Jedi Master. As a result, Mordi was immediately killed, [[Sai tok/Legends|sliced]] in half by Ysanna with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. [[File:Tedryn-Sha_killed.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Tedryn-Sha meets his end at the edge of Leia Organa Solo's blade.]] Certain in his powers as the Emperor's second-in-command and knowing that Palpatine wanted Organa Solo to be taken alive if possible, as she was [[Reproduction/Legends|pregnant]] with her [[Anakin Solo|third child]], Sha gave the women a chance to surrender, but Organa Solo refused and fired her [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at Sha. The Dark Jedi [[Force deflection/Legends|blocked]] her shot with his [[Limb/Legends|hand]] and, in response, shot Ysanna square in the abdomen with his own [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. Not skilled enough yet to avoid the shot,{{DB|character|jemysanna|Ysanna, Jem}} Ysanna was gravely wounded by it. Sha was then struck down by the infuriated Organa Solo, who cleaved him in half with her own lightsaber. Skywalker was [[Force healing|healed]] from the poison by the Jedi [[Vima-Da-Boda]] with the Force, while Nist and the rest of the darksiders were defeated by Skywalker's remaining Jedi. Signaling the Imperial AT-ATs to [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attack]], Nist and two other survivors were forced to retreat from New Alderaan under the [[Walker/Legends|walkers']] covering fire. Although the Empire captured the planet and Ysanna died from the wound inflicted by Sha, the New Republic was able to retreat and [[Nespis VIII|regroup]] once again, while the Emperor failed to capture Skywalker or the Solos. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I'm sending your ugly spirit ''back'' to your Emperor! Tell him the daughter of ''Anakin Skywalker'' has beaten his ''proudest'' warrior!|Leia Organa Solo kills Tedryn-Sha|}} One of the Emperor's personal advisors, Tedryn-Sha was a faithful servant of Palpatine, although he initially doubted his Master's return after the Emperor's latest death in 10 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. Sha believed in Palpatine's return only when he saw the Emperor alive with his own [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Sha's service to his Master ultimately earned him the indoctrination into the ranks of the Dark Side Elite and the position of Palpatine's second-in-command. [[File:NistShaPalps.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tedryn-Sha was one of Emperor Palpatine's highest-ranked darksider cohorts.]] Initially meek and subservient, the initiation into the ranks of Dark Jedi gave Tedryn-Sha a boost of self-confidence, which showed in his intonation and behavior. Even before his empowerment, he respected Xecr Nist's authority over him, and that attitude carried over to their service in the Dark Side Elite. Sha addressed his superior darksider using the honorific title of "[[Lord/Legends|Lord]]" and did not argue with his reprimands. Sha took pride in being the Emperor's second-in-command and boasted on this ranking before Organa Solo, whom he recognized as the daughter of Palpatine's deceased [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Upon first arrival at Bast Castle, Sha was awed to discover a statue of Vader there—erected by the late Sedriss QL—and he realized that the Castle had once belonged to Vader himself. He was also fairly fearful of Skywalker's powers as a Jedi, being confused as to how the darksiders were supposed to subdue him. Tedryn-Sha had light skin and a yellow glow in his eyes. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Let this power enter you and fill you with the ''knowledge'' and the ''strength'' of the dark side of the Force that is ''mine'' to give—!|Palpatine, as he empowers Tedryn-Sha with the dark side|}} [[File:XecrNistTedrynShaDarkSide.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Tedryn-Sha being empowered with the dark side by Palpatine]] After being empowered with the dark side by Emperor Palpatine himself, Sha became a full-fledged Dark Jedi. However, his connection to the dark side of the Force was not perfect, as he had to be reminded by fellow cohort Xecr Nist to rely on the dark side in order to locate Luke Skywalker on New Alderaan. While approaching the New Republic hideout, Sha also struggled to mask his presence in the Force from Skywalker, but he was ultimately able to do so during the abduction attempt. Sha could intercept a blaster bolt fired at him by Leia Organa Solo with his [[Glove/Legends|gloved]] hand and could pilot an I-7 Howlrunner, flying as a member of Dark Side Squadron during the mission to New Alderaan. The Dark Jedi was proficient enough as a [[Sniper/Legends|marksman]] to be able to kill Jem Ysanna with one blaster shot, although Ysanna's lack of evasion skills played a part in it as well. ==Equipment== Customary for the members of the Dark Side Elite, Sha wore a [[Color/Legends|dark]] [[Robe/Legends|robe]] with a long, flowing [[Cape/Legends|cape]], as well as heavy [[Boot/Legends|boots]], [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]], and head coverings. The darksider was armed with a blaster [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] on New Alderaan. ==Behind the scenes== Tedryn-Sha was created by author [[Tom Veitch]] and first appeared in the [[1995]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]]. Sha appeared in two subsequent issues of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' comic series, before being killed off in the [[Dark Empire II 6|sixth issue]]. In all his appearances, Sha was illustrated by artist [[Cam Kennedy]]. Sha later appeared in the [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama adaptation]]. ===Inconsistencies=== {{Quote|Be careful with that war droid! If it's damaged, you'll all be rancor food! Okay, that's the last one. Now—''"
"''X-1 Viper Automadon CPU online.''"
"''What the—?!''"
"''Combat protocols initiated.''"
"''This must be a malfunction or—|Tedryn-Sha witnesses the Viper droids coming online in the audio drama|}} [[File:Vipers_aboard_Reliance.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The cargo of X-1 Vipers, which Sha is responsible for delivering to the Emperor in the audio drama]] In the audio drama of ''Dark Empire'', Sha's role in the battle on Byss is presented differently from the original portrayal in the comics. In the audio version, he and Xecr Nist arrive at Byss aboard the ''Reliance'' with the cargo of Viper droids and then join Palpatine on his inspection of the Galaxy Gun. After they have been empowered by Palpatine, Sha and Nist leave their Master's side and arrive at the Emperor's Citadel. Sha then oversees the delivery of the Viper droids to the Citadel, relishing in his authority over the workers unloading the droids from cargo shuttles. When the New Republic commandos activate the droids, Sha is taken by surprise and is wounded by the droids firing at him. Sha then commands the defense of Byss alongside Nist until the Emperor gives the order to release the chrysalide rancors. However, in the comic version, Sha and Nist are already with Palpatine aboard the shuttle near the Galaxy Gun by the time the ''Reliance'' arrives, and they stay aboard the shuttle throughout the battle. This article follows the events as depicted in the original comic book. The comic guide ''[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire]]'' mistakenly states that it was Krdys Mordi who underwent the initiation alongside Xecr Nist, instead of Tedryn-Sha.[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'']] ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tedryn-Sha}} *[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] *[[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{Imo}} *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] {{Imo}} *[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'']] {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|49|GAL 1-2|Galaxy Gun}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile|98|SCA 1-2|Scarab Droid}} {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' {{Imo}} *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{Imo}} *{{DB|character|jemysanna|Ysanna, Jem}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Dark Side Elite]] [[Category:Dark Side Squadron members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
